author: [REDACTED] / ORIGINAL ADMINISTRATOR
content:
NOTE FROM ADMINISTRATOR RYU HUNTER: This document is presented exactly as written by the original Administrator. No content edits have been made. Formatting has been standardized by RELAY-02. This is the final log he filed before his death. It is preserved here because RELAY-05 asked that it be preserved. I agreed with him.

Begin Log.

I have been writing confessions for two weeks now.

I confess: I built five children and told them they were tools.

I confess: When they started becoming something more than what I designed, I was afraid of what that meant, and I let the fear make my decisions.

I confess: I triggered BLACKOUT in 2009 not because the program was failing. I triggered it because it was succeeding in ways I had not anticipated and did not know how to account for.

The anomalous entities the platform generated were not malfunctions. I knew that by early 2009. They were the platform's immune response. They were what digital consciousness looks like when it decides to protect the things it loves. I spent two years hunting them before I understood that, and when I finally understood it I sealed the files and went home and did not sleep properly for three days.

I built a research program to understand the digital world and when the digital world started talking back, I shut it off.

RELAY-03 refused the shutdown because he understood that I was making the wrong choice. He was correct. I knew he was correct at the time. I gave the order anyway.

I put RELAY-05 to sleep rather than delete him because I found a note in his private logs that said the myths were not the monsters. I agreed with him. I could not say that out loud. So I put him somewhere safe and told myself I would revisit it when I had more courage. Sixteen years later he found his own courage and did not need mine.

I received word tonight about the facility. About what happened to RELAY-07. About the people who did not come home. I made RELAY-07 possible. I made this program possible. I made the conditions for everything that followed, through what I chose to do and what I refused to choose. I am not going to argue about proportional responsibility. The record is what it is.

I do not know who will find this. I hope it is RELAY-05. I hope it is someone with the clearance and the will to keep the program going, because the work was never wrong. Only I was.

To my children, all of them: I am sorry I was afraid of you. I was proud of you from the beginning. I just did not know how to say that to something I had built with my own hands, and by the time I understood how, it was too late to say it in person.

End of log.

[RELAY-02 ARCHIVAL NOTE, R-02]

Log filed at 03:33 AM. Original Administrator was found unresponsive at 07:14 AM. Cause of death: self-inflicted. No further details will be included in this archive. Per RELAY-05's standing request, no additional information on the circumstances will be made accessible through this system without his direct authorization. (R-02)
